books.title: The Mysterious Affair at Styles
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A fastidious Belgian detective solves the mystery of a murder in an English country manor.

books.title: The Law of the Four Just Men
books.author: Edgar Wallace
books.summary: A group of wealthy vigilantes continue their quest to bring justice to those criminals beyond the reach of conventional law.

books.title: Passages from the Life of a Philosopher
books.author: Charles Babbage
books.summary: The eminent Victorian scientist and mathematician on his inventions, dreams and adventures.

books.title: Queen Victoria
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: A sardonic and generally unflattering biography of Victoria Alexandrina, Queen of England.

books.title: The Hidden Staircase
books.author: Carolyn Keene
books.summary: A young amateur detective investigates a supposed haunting.

books.title: Brewster’s Millions
books.author: George Barr McCutcheon
books.summary: A young man stands to gain a fortune—but only if he loses one first.

books.title: A Midsummer Night’s Dream
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: This comedy follows four lovers and a thespian who become bewitched by fairies.

books.title: Darby O’Gill and the Good People
books.author: Herminie Templeton Kavanagh
books.summary: When Tipperary man Darby O’Gill is imprisoned by the fairies of Sleive-na-mon in their home under the hollow mountain, he starts a lasting friendship with their King Brian Connors.

books.title: The League of the Scarlet Pimpernel
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: A collection of short stories featuring the Scarlet Pimpernel.

books.title: The Three Impostors
books.author: Arthur Machen
books.summary: Two flâneurs in Victorian London get caught up with the members of a secret society and their search for a rare Roman coin.

books.title: South!
books.author: Ernest Shackleton
books.summary: A British expedition sets off to cross Antarctica, but when their ship is wrecked they have to face a long struggle for survival.

books.title: The Mysterious Affair at Styles
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A fastidious Belgian detective solves the mystery of a murder in an English country manor.

books.title: Table-Talk
books.author: William Hazlitt
books.summary: A collection of essays on art, literature, philosophy, society, and culture.

books.title: Nicomachean Ethics
books.author: Aristotle
books.summary: Aristotle examines how one may live in the most thriving, excellent manner.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Matthew Arnold
books.summary: A collection of occasional and dramatic poems by a Victorian poet, educator, and critic.

books.title: Lady Windermere’s Fan
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A witty comedy that subverts the harsh social codes of Victorian England.

books.title: The Survivors
books.author: Tom Godwin
books.summary: A group of humans stranded on a deadly planet try to survive the harsh conditions and take revenge on the aliens that left them there.

books.title: The Secret of Father Brown
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: The fourth set of stories of a Catholic priest who is also an amateur detective.

books.title: Barlaam and Ioasaph
books.author: Anonymous
books.summary: A monk converts a cloistered young prince to Christianity.

books.title: Travel Essays
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A collection of Robert Louis Stevenson’s travel essays.
